title: Patternmakers, Wood
description: Plan, lay out, and construct wooden unit or sectional patterns used in forming sand molds for castings.

tasks.text: Read blueprints, drawings, or written specifications to determine sizes and shapes of patterns and required machine setups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fit, fasten, and assemble wood parts together to form patterns, models, or sections, using glue, nails, dowels, bolts, and screws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out patterns on wood stock and draw outlines of units, sectional patterns, or full-scale mock-ups of products, based on blueprint specifications and sketches, and using marking and measuring devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim, smooth, and shape surfaces, and plane, shave, file, scrape, and sand models to attain specified shapes, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Divide patterns into sections according to shapes of castings to facilitate removal of patterns from molds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify dimensions of completed patterns, using templates, straightedges, calipers, or protractors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Correct patterns to compensate for defects in castings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up, operate, and adjust a variety of woodworking machines such as bandsaws and lathes to cut and shape sections, parts, and patterns, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Finish completed products or models with shellac, lacquer, wax, or paint.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate costs for patternmaking jobs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark identifying information such as colors or codes on patterns, parts, and templates to indicate assembly methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair broken or damaged patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain pattern records for reference.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Glue fillets along interior angles of patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct wooden models, templates, full scale mock-ups, jigs, or molds for shaping parts of products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute dimensions, areas, volumes, and weights.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select lumber to be used for patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect and store patterns and lumber.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inventory equipment and supplies, ordering parts and tools as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue patterns to designated machine operators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
